name: Browntown Wilderness Park
description: Browntown Wilderness Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kingsland, GA. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Harrietts Bluff Community Park
description: Harrietts Bluff Community Park is a place to play pickleball in Woodbine, GA. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Reservations are not available. The court is free.

name: Howard Peeples Park
description: These 8 courts have recently been resurfaced and are now open for play.

name: Walkabout Camp & RV Park
description: Come play pickleball at Walkabout Camp & RV Park in Woodbine, GA! There is 1 outdoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. You can reserve the court.
open_play_schedule: This is a private court. Call ahead to setup a time to play.
